title: Sync with Jira by People
excerpt: We track Time Spent in Jira. We use monday for resource planning and estimating. I’d like to bring each resources’ Time Spent from Jira into monday and associate the Time Spent to the resources’ subitems in monday

posts.author: nickjs (Nick Soberanis)
posts.cookedHtml: We track Time Spent in Jira. We use monday for resource planning and estimating. I’d like to bring each resources’ Time Spent from Jira into monday and associate the Time Spent to the resources’ subitems in monday

posts.author: patrick7 (Patrick Kool)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Nick,

Sounds like a fun challenge you have there.
Do you use native Jira time tracking features or an extension like Tempo?

I’ve worked a lot with Jira and have a few ideas on how we can solve this.

I’d be happy to discuss your challenge in a free consultancy call. You can schedule it here.

Greetings,

Patrick

posts.author: crystal9 (Crystal Newcomb)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Patrick - I am also having issues with syncing the time spent on a Jira task to a field in monday. We use Jira Cloud. Ideally I can sync the total time spent on all tasks/time trackers under a single epic to monday. I could be convinced to sync individual tasks and not by epic but that is not ideal.

posts.author: patrick7 (Patrick Kool)
posts.cookedHtml:
Crystal Newcomb:

Hi Crystal, maybe we can look into your challenge during a call?
You can schedule it here

Greetings,

Patrick
